To use [**Nalpamaradi Thailam - Skin Brightening Oil with Turmeric for Body and Face (16 herbs)**](https://www.bluenectar.co.in/products/nalpamaradi-tailam-skin-brightening-oil-face-body):

1. Apply a generous amount to clean, dry skin on your face and body.
2. Gently massage in circular motions, allowing the oil to absorb for 30 minutes to 1 hour.
3. Rinse off with a mild cleanser or lukewarm water.

For best results, use daily. Due to turmeric, the oil may leave a slight yellow tint—this is natural and washes off easily. Always patch test before first use, especially for sensitive skin.

The vibrant blue petals turn pink when you add lemon—a fun, color-changing infusion!

**Tummy herbal infusion** targets **digestive wellness and gut health**. It's designed to soothe and support your digestive system with a different blend of ingredients.

**Choose Butterfly Pea if:** You want metabolism support, natural detox, and weight management.

**Choose Tummy if:** You're focused on digestive comfort and gut wellness.

Both are **caffeine-free and keto-friendly**. Your choice depends on whether you prioritize fitness/detox or digestive support. 💙

How do I use it daily? copy-of-hydrating-hand-wash-250ml-by-shankara

To use the [**Kansa Massage & Marma Wand by Shankara**](https://www.srisritattva.com/products/copy-of-hydrating-hand-wash-250ml-by-shankara) daily, follow these steps:

1. Begin with clean, dry skin. You may apply a light facial oil if desired.
2. Use the smaller orb to gently massage Marma points (energy points) on your face.
3. Use the larger orb for broader areas—massage up and down the sides of your neck, along the jawline (TMJ), and lift from chin to ear and lips to cheekbones.
4. Repeat each motion 5–7 times, using gentle pressure.

Daily use helps detoxify, improve circulation, and promote a radiant, balanced complexion. For personalized guidance, you can also consult our Ayurvedic doctors on WhatsApp.

Multivitamins aren’t about overnight change—they’re about consistency. And that’s what He’s Active offers: a gentle, dependable partner in your daily routine. With its blend of vitamins, trace elements, and thoughtfully chosen herbs, it’s designed to fit into real, everyday lives. Short Webcontent: Modern life moves fast. Early meetings, long commutes, quick meals, late nights—and somewhere in between, the expectation of staying energetic, fit, and mentally sharp. It’s no surprise that many men feel stretched thin. If you’ve been browsing for the best multivitamin tablets for men or wondering whether you need one, this guide is for you. And if you’re curious about a thoughtfully balanced, Ayurvedic-inspired option, meet He’s Active Multivitamin for Men by Sri Sri Tattva. What Are Multivitamin Tablets for Men? Multivitamin tablets are daily supplements that combine essential nutrients—vitamins, minerals, and sometimes herbal extracts—formulated to suit men’s specific wellness needs. They’re not meant to replace a healthy diet or lifestyle but to fill in the small nutritional gaps that often sneak in. What to Look for When Choosing a Multivitamin? When exploring options for the best multivitamin tablets for men, consider: Does it offer more than just the basics? Are the ingredients clean and transparent? Is it aligned with your lifestyle and values? Does it suit your energy, digestion, and daily habits? He’s Active checks many of these boxes, making it a candidate for the top multivitamin for men without the noise of exaggerated promises. A Gentle Peek Into He’s Active Multivitamin He’s Active is a unique blend of essential nutrients and botanical extracts in a convenient capsule format. What makes it stand out isn’t just its complete vitamin-mineral profile but also the addition of herbs and amino acids rooted in Ayurvedic knowledge and modern nutritional science. Here’s a closer look at some of its key ingredients: Minerals and trace elements support various functions, from immune health to muscle function and nerve signaling. Vitamins – including the 13 essential ones your body needs daily, contributing to overall balance and vitality. Ashwagandha Extract – An ancient herb known in Ayurveda for its calming and restorative qualities. Ginseng Extract – Traditionally used to promote stamina and vitality. Grape Seed Extract – Rich in antioxidants, offering gentle support for cellular health. Alpha Lipoic Acid – A naturally occurring compound involved in energy metabolism. L-taurine, L-glutamine, L-arginine, L-methionine – These amino acids play various roles in energy production, muscle function, and tissue repair. Myo-inositol – A compound that supports nerve function and hormonal balance. Papain is a natural enzyme derived from papaya that is often used to support digestion. This combination makes He’s Active one of the more balanced options when considering a top multivitamin for men, especially for those who want more than standard vitamins and minerals. Why do Multivitamin Needs Differ for Men? Everyone needs good nutrition, but men often have specific wellness areas that benefit from focused nutritional support, including stamina, muscle health, and stress management. That’s why choosing the top-rated multivitamin for men is about more than just labels; it’s about looking for blends that match your lifestyle. Who Is He’s Active For? how to use

To use [**Mouth Oil for Oil Pulling with Coconut & Mint for Oral care and Bad Breath (9 herbs)**](https://www.bluenectar.co.in/products/mouth-pulling-oil):

1. Take 1 tablespoon (about 10 ml) of the oil.
2. Swish it gently in your mouth for 10–15 minutes, ensuring it reaches all areas.
3. Do not swallow the oil.
4. Spit it out and rinse your mouth thoroughly with warm water.
5. Brush your teeth as usual.

For best results, practice this daily in the morning before eating or drinking. This authentic Ayurvedic ritual supports oral hygiene, fresher breath, and overall wellness.
